name: Booking Holdings
analysis: BKNG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry $173.4750, stop $156.5388, target $193.4337 (1.18:1) — then trail it.
